description: Root context menu item is a component that makes a new context menu item appear for the active user for when they open their context menu.

fields.OnlyForSide: When set, the item will only be inserted when the context menu is opened on the specified hand.
fields.ExcludeOnTools: Determines whether or not the item shows up when opening the context menu while having a tool equipped on the same hand.
fields.ExcludePrimaryHand: Makes the item not show up when the context menu is open on the user's primary hand.
fields.ExcludeSecondaryHand: Makes the item not show up when the context menu is open on the user's secondary hand.
fields.Item: The ContextMenuItemSource that will be inserted into the context menu.
